zh.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Arques是Geoffert de Bolbec Vicomte de Rouen et d'Arques和Beatrix De Rouen的兒子，於1035年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利阿爾可-拉-巴塔爾。他和Beatrice Malet至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於大約1086年在英國英格蘭越可爾索普 在 洛維爾享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Arques是Geoffert de Bolbec Vicomte de Rouen et d'Arques和Beatrix De Rouen的儿子，于1035年出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利阿爾可-拉-巴塔爾。他和Beatrice Malet至少有4个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于大约1086年在英国英格兰越可爾索普 在 洛維爾享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Arques
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Mario, Luis, Fernando, Jorge, Armando, Ana, Joaquin, Julio, Marcos.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Henrique, Lourenco, Seraphine, Vasco.

Catalan (Marquès); Spanish and southern French (Marqués): from Catalan marquès, Spanish and Occitan marqués ‘marquis’, words of French origin (see Marquis ), applied either as a nickname for someone who behaved like a marquis or as an occupational name for a servant in the household of a marquis.
Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name   Marcos  .

variants.name: Marquis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Normand, Marcel, Fernand, Lucien, Rosaire, Andre, Armand, Camille, Cecile, Jacques, Francois.

French: from the title marquis ‘marquess’, applied as an ironic nickname to someone who behaved like a marquis or as a metonymic occupational name for a servant in the household of a marquis. The title, derived from an ancient Germanic word meaning ‘boundary’ (compare March ), originally referred to the governor of a border territory. Marquises did not form part of the original French feudal structure of nobility; the title was first adopted by the Counts of Toulouse because of their possessions in the border region beyond the Rhône. Compare Markee and Markey .

English: nickname from Middle English markis ‘marquis, marquess, nobleman’ (Old French marchis); see also 1 above. The word is also found as a female personal name which may also be origin of the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Arques was born in 1035, in Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France as the son of Geoffert de Bolbec Vicomte de Rouen et d'Arques and Beatrix De Rouen. He had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Beatrice Malet. He died about 1086, in Thorpe in Rothwell, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Arques est né en 1035, à Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, fils de Geoffert de Bolbec Vicomte de Rouen et d'Arques et Beatrix De Rouen. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Beatrice Malet. Il est décédé environ 1086, à Thorpe in Rothwell, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

Er hatte mit Beatrice Malet mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb um 1086 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Thorpe in Rothwell, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Arquesは1035年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメアルクエス-ラ-バティイルでGeoffert de Bolbec Vicomte de Rouen et d'ArquesとBeatrix De Rouenの息子として生まれた。彼はBeatrice Maletとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1086年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソルペ イン ロスウエルで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Arques(은)는 1035년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 아크스-라-바테이에서 Geoffert de Bolbec Vicomte de Rouen et d'Arques(와)과 Beatrix De Rouen의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Beatrice Malet(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1086년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 소 인 로스웰에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Arques родился в 1035 г. в местности аркуес-ла-батеилл, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция. Его родителей звали Geoffert de Bolbec Vicomte de Rouen et d'Arques и Beatrix De Rouen. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Beatrice Malet. Он умер около 1086 г. в местности таурп ин ротвелл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.
